changes.comment: Fix invisible pressed/active state on sg-button and sg-chip (solid, flat, bordered variants) caused by incorrect use of --_theme-content as background color token
Add SurfaceVariant type (VisualVariant | 'glass') for container components that support the glass variant
Add dispose() and [Symbol.dispose]() as aliases for cleanup() on OverlayControl for resource-management ergonomics
Fix createFocusTrap to skip abort-listener registration when signal is already aborted at construction time
Add @security JSDoc to DataGridColumn.renderExpanded noting that the returned HTML is set via innerHTML
